# Known OpenAPI drift — routes that are intentionally excluded from the
# OpenAPI surface or that predate this verifier.
#
# Format: METHOD /path (one per line, comments start with #)
#
# Documentation UIs — these serve HTML documentation, not an API surface.
GET /api/v0/docs
GET /api/v0/redoc
# TODO(#3781): add openapi_paths_code_visualize fragment for this route.
POST /api/v0/code/visualize
